author: hangleang
content: Not sure if this is relevant, but last time I was testing is Lighthouse down-score Grandine with invalid proposal slot error for the next epoch proposer preferences

author: hangleang
content:
Jun 03 09:16:53.006 DEBUG Rejected gossip proposer preferences          error: "InvalidProposalSlot { validator_index: 157, proposal_slot: Slot(16) }", proposal_slot: 16, validator_index: 157
Jun 03 09:16:53.006 DEBUG Rejected gossip proposer preferences          error: "InvalidProposalSlot { validator_index: 208, proposal_slot: Slot(17) }", proposal_slot: 17, validator_index: 208
Jun 03 09:16:53.006 DEBUG Peer score adjusted                           msg: invalid_gossip_proposer_preferences, peer_id: 16Uiu2HAmVAeuYZtJFjqLYMFdKADHDwu5WuABk22YSDuHaxzEBjNc, score: -9.99
Jun 03 09:16:53.006 DEBUG Peer score adjusted                           msg: invalid_gossip_proposer_preferences, peer_id: 16Uiu2HAmVAeuYZtJFjqLYMFdKADHDwu5WuABk22YSDuHaxzEBjNc, score: -19.99
Jun 03 09:16:53.006 DEBUG Successfully verified gossip proposer preferences  proposal_slot: 9, validator_index: 163
Jun 03 09:16:53.006 DEBUG Successfully verified gossip proposer preferences  proposal_slot: 12, validator_index: 161

author: hangleang
content: This happen at the start of epoch 1, Lighthouse accept the current epoch but reject the next epoch, I was running with minimal preset

author: hangleang
content: So Grandine has to broadcast just the current epoch to avoid being down scored by lighthouse

author: hangleang
content: While other clients didn’t reject those messages

author: 0xunclebill
content:
do you have a branch where granadine broadcasts preferences for one epoch ahead?

we fixed it in this PR here: https://github.com/sigp/lighthouse/pull/9337

wasnt included  in our devnet branch until yesterday

author: hangleang
content: for only broadcast current epoch, I have a feature branch at https://github.com/grandinetech/grandine with the branch feature/only-broadcast-current-epoch-proposer-preferences

author: 0xunclebill
content: oh okay, well i ran today and i wasn't seeing us penalizing grandine nodes

author: 0xunclebill
content: was running just the vanilla glamsterdam-devnet-5

author: hangleang
content: Is it with the PR included?

author: 0xunclebill
content: yes our glamsterdam-devnet-5 branch has the fix
